sql.trim: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.PARTY_MONEY_USED, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.PARTY_MONEY_YEAR, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.PARTY_MONEY, t1.STATUS, t1.VERSION, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.PARTY_FINANCE, t1.PARTY_FINANCE_USED, t1.PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED, t1.DATA_2,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER
CREATED_BY,
PARTY_MONEY_USED,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
PARTY_MONEY_YEAR,
CREATION_DATE,
PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
PARTY_MONEY,
STATUS,
VERSION,
PARTY_NAME,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
PARTY_ID,
PARTY_FINANCE,
PARTY_FINANCE_USED,
PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED,
DATA_2,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyMoneyUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyMoneyYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{partyMoneyNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyFinance,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{partyFinanceUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyFinanceNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER( CREATED_BY , PARTY_MONEY_USED , LAST_UPDATED_BY , PARTY_MONEY_YEAR , CREATION_DATE , PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , PARTY_MONEY , STATUS , VERSION , PARTY_NAME , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , LAST_UPDATE_IP , PARTY_ID , PARTY_FINANCE , PARTY_FINANCE_USED , PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED , DATA_2 )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyMoneyUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyMoneyYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.partyMoneyNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyFinance,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyFinanceUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyFinanceNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_MONEY_USED = #{partyMoneyUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_MONEY_YEAR = #{partyMoneyYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED = #{partyMoneyNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_FINANCE = #{partyFinance,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
PARTY_FINANCE_USED = #{partyFinanceUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED = #{partyFinanceNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY_USED = #{partyMoneyUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY_YEAR = #{partyMoneyYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED = #{partyMoneyNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_FINANCE = #{partyFinance,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_FINANCE_USED = #{partyFinanceUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED = #{partyFinanceNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_PART_EXPENSE_LEDGER set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY_USED = #{item.partyMoneyUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY_YEAR = #{item.partyMoneyYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_MONEY_NOT_USED = #{item.partyMoneyNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_MONEY = #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , STATUS = #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_FINANCE = #{item.partyFinance,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_FINANCE_USED = #{item.partyFinanceUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_FINANCE_NOT_USED = #{item.partyFinanceNotUsed,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_2 = #{item.data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
